records.stderr_pattern: requires rustc \d+\.\d+\.\d+ or newer.*currently active rustc version is
records.description: Crate requires newer rustc — switch to stable toolchain

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: package axum v0.7.2 cannot be built because it requires rustc 1.74.0 or newer, while the currently active rustc version is 1.70.0" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: failed to select a version for|all possible versions conflict
records.description: Semver conflict in dependency tree — allow resolver fallback

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: failed to select a version for syn" >&2; echo "all possible versions conflict with previously selected packages" >&2; exit 1'

records.description: Unstable feature used on stable — switch to nightly toolchain

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error[E0658]: use of unstable library feature" >&2; exit 1'
